def sorted_slot_list_intersection(template_slots, instance_slots) do
  for t_slot <- template_slots,
      i_slot <- instance_slots,
      Template.slots_match?(t_slot, i_slot) do
    t_slot
  end
  |> Enum.sort(&Template.slot_precedes_or_equal?/2)
end

def audio_volume(%Screen{app_id: app_id}, now, static_params \\ @static_params) do
  case Map.fetch!(static_params, app_id) do
    %Static{periodic_audio: nil} ->
      nil

    %Static{
      periodic_audio: %PeriodicAudio{
        day_volume: day_volume,
        night_time: {night_start, night_end},
        night_volume: night_volume
      }
    } ->
      if now |> Util.to_eastern() |> Util.time_in_range?(night_start, night_end) do
        night_volume
      else
        day_volume
      end
  end
end

def product(list_of_lists) do
  Enum.reduce(list_of_lists, [[]], fn list, acc ->
    for l <- list, a <- acc do
      a ++ [l]
    end
  end)
end

definition:
def priority(t) do
  tiebreakers =
    @flex_zone_alert_base_priority ++
      [
        tiebreaker_primary_timeframe(t),
        tiebreaker_location(t),
        tiebreaker_secondary_timeframe(t),
        tiebreaker_effect(t)
      ]

  cond do
    Enum.any?(tiebreakers, &(&1 == :no_render)) -> :no_render
    takeover_alert?(t) -> @automated_override_priority
    true -> tiebreakers
  end
end
elixir_type: (%{:screen => dynamic(), :alert => dynamic(), :location_context => dynamic(), :now => dynamic(), :__struct__ => :"Screens.V2.WidgetInstance.Alert"} -> non_empty_list(integer(), empty_list()) or :no_render)

def tiebreaker_location(%__MODULE__{} = t) do
  case LocalizedAlert.location(t) do
    :inside -> 1
    :boundary_upstream -> 2
    :boundary_downstream -> 2
    :downstream -> 3
    _ -> :no_render
  end
end
elixir_type: (%{:screen => dynamic(), :alert => dynamic(), :location_context => dynamic(), :now => dynamic(), :__struct__ => :"Screens.V2.WidgetInstance.Alert"} -> integer() or :no_render)

definition:
def tiebreaker_primary_timeframe(%__MODULE__{} = t) do
  from_onset = seconds_from_onset(t)

  cond do
    from_onset < 4 * @week -> 1
    from_onset in (4 * @week)..(12 * @week - 1) -> 2
    from_onset in (12 * @week)..(24 * @week - 1) -> 4
    true -> :no_render
  end
end
elixir_type: (%{:screen => dynamic(), :alert => dynamic(), :location_context => dynamic(), :now => dynamic(), :__struct__ => :"Screens.V2.WidgetInstance.Alert"} -> integer() or :no_render)

definition:
def tiebreaker_secondary_timeframe(%__MODULE__{} = t) do
  if seconds_from_onset(t) in (4 * @week)..(12 * @week - 1) do
    1
  else
    2
  end
end
elixir_type: (%{:screen => dynamic(), :alert => dynamic(), :location_context => dynamic(), :now => dynamic(), :__struct__ => :"Screens.V2.WidgetInstance.Alert"} -> integer())

def headsign_with_variation(headsign) do
  via_pattern = ~r/(.+) (via .+)/
  paren_pattern = ~r/(.+) (\(.+)/

  [headsign, variation] =
    cond do
      String.match?(headsign, via_pattern) ->
        Regex.run(via_pattern, headsign, capture: :all_but_first)

      String.match?(headsign, paren_pattern) ->
        Regex.run(paren_pattern, headsign, capture: :all_but_first)

      true ->
        [headsign, nil]
    end

  %{headsign: headsign, variation: variation}
end
elixir_type: (binary() -> %{:variation => :nil or binary(), :headsign => binary()})

def serialize_headsign([first_departure | _], %Screen{app_id: :dup_v2} = screen) do
  headsign =
    first_departure |> Departure.headsign() |> simplify_shuttle_headsign(first_departure, screen)

  headsign_replacements = Application.get_env(:screens, :dup_headsign_replacements)
  %{headsign: Map.get(headsign_replacements, headsign, headsign)}
end
def serialize_headsign([first_departure | _], screen) do
  first_departure
  |> Departure.headsign()
  |> simplify_shuttle_headsign(first_departure, screen)
  |> headsign_with_variation()
end

definition:
def simplify_shuttle_headsign(headsign, departure, screen) do
  if RoutePill.shuttle_route?(Departure.route(departure), screen) do
    case Regex.run(~r/^(.*?)\s*\(([^)]*?)\s*shuttle\s*\)\s*$/i, headsign) do
      [_, base, prefix] ->
        trimmed_prefix = String.trim(prefix)

        if trimmed_prefix == "" do
          String.trim(base)
        else
          String.trim(base) <> " (" <> trimmed_prefix <> ")"
        end

      nil ->
        headsign
    end
  else
    headsign
  end
end
elixir_type: (binary(), %{:prediction => :nil or dynamic(), :schedule => :nil or dynamic(), :__struct__ => :"Screens.V2.Departure"}, %{:app_id => :bus_eink_v2 or :bus_shelter_v2 or :busway_v2 or :dup_v2 or :gl_eink_v2 or :pre_fare_v2, :app_params => dynamic() or dynamic() or dynamic() or dynamic() or dynamic() or dynamic(), :device_id => dynamic(), :disabled => :false or :true, :hidden_from_screenplay => :false or :true, :location => :nil or dynamic(), :name => dynamic(), :refresh_if_loaded_before => :nil or dynamic(), :tags => non_empty_list(dynamic(), empty_list()) or empty_list(), :vendor => :nil or :solari or :outfront or :mercury or :lg_mri or :gds or :c3ms, :__struct__ => :"ScreensConfig.Screen"} -> binary())

definition:
def get_closed_platform_name(t) do
  child_stop_ids =
    t |> DupAlert.child_stops_for_affected_line() |> Enum.map(& &1.id) |> MapSet.new()

  platform_names =
    t.alert.informed_entities
    |> Enum.filter(&(&1.stop.id in child_stop_ids and &1.stop.platform_name))
    |> Enum.map(& &1.stop.platform_name)

  case platform_names do
    [platform_name] ->
      platform_name

    [] ->
      nil

    multiple_platforms ->
      if Enum.all?(multiple_platforms, &(&1 in @gl_westbound_platforms)) do
        @gl_westbound_direction_name
      else
        Report.warning("unexpected_platform_closure_dup",
          alert_id: t.alert.id,
          home_stop: t.location_context.home_stop
        )

        nil
      end
  end
end
elixir_type: (%{:screen => dynamic(), :alert => dynamic(), :location_context => dynamic(), :rotation_index => :zero or :one or :two, :stop_name => dynamic(), :__struct__ => :"Screens.V2.WidgetInstance.DupAlert"} -> binary() or :nil)

def serialize_dual_screen(t) do
  case DisruptionDiagram.serialize(t) do
    {:ok, diagram} -> t |> dual_screen_fields() |> Map.put(:disruption_diagram, diagram)
    {:error, reason} -> t |> report_diagram_error(reason) |> dual_screen_fallback_fields()
  end
end

definition:
def format_station_name_list([string]) do
  [%{format: :nowrap, text: "#{string}"}]
end
def format_station_name_list([s1, s2]) do
  [%{format: :nowrap, text: "#{s1}"}, " & ", %{format: :nowrap, text: "#{s2}"}]
end
def format_station_name_list(list) do
  list
  |> List.update_at(-1, &" & #{&1}")
  |> Enum.join(", #")
  |> String.split("#")
  |> Enum.map(fn string -> %{format: :nowrap, text: string} end)
  |> Enum.intersperse("")
end

definition:
def do_serialize(route_id, opts)
def do_serialize(route, %{large: true}) do
  %{type: :text, text: String.upcase("#{route} line")}
end
def do_serialize("Red", _) do
  %{type: :text, text: "RL"}
end
def do_serialize("Mattapan", _) do
  %{type: :text, text: "M"}
end
def do_serialize("Orange", _) do
  %{type: :text, text: "OL"}
end
def do_serialize("Green-" <> branch, %{gl_branch: true} = opts) do
  %{
    type: :text,
    text:
      if opts[:gl_long] do
        "Green Line "
      else
        "GL·"
      end <> branch
  }
end
def do_serialize("Green" <> _branch, %{gl_long: true}) do
  %{type: :text, text: "Green Line"}
end
def do_serialize("Green-" <> _branch, _) do
  %{type: :text, text: "GL"}
end
def do_serialize("Green", _) do
  %{type: :text, text: "GL"}
end
def do_serialize("Blue", _) do
  %{type: :text, text: "BL"}
end
def do_serialize("CR-" <> line, opts) do
  abbreviation =
    Map.get_lazy(@cr_line_abbreviations, line, fn ->
      Report.warning("missing_route_pill_abbreviation", line: line)
      nil
    end)

  base = %{route_abbrev: abbreviation}

  if track_number = opts[:track_number] do
    Map.merge(base, %{type: :text, text: "TR#{track_number}"})
  else
    Map.merge(base, %{type: :icon, icon: :rail})
  end
end
def do_serialize("CapeFlyer", _) do
  %{type: :icon, icon: :rail}
end
def do_serialize("Boat-" <> _line, _) do
  %{type: :icon, icon: :boat}
end
def do_serialize(route_id, opts) do
  opts
  |> Map.get(:route_name, "")
  |> then(fn name ->
    if valid_text_for_pill?(name) do
      name
    else
      route_id
    end
  end)
  |> then(fn text ->
    if valid_text_for_pill?(text) do
      %{type: :text, text: text}
    else
      %{type: :icon, icon: :bus}
    end
  end)
end
elixir_type: (binary(), %{:large => if_set(:false or :true), :track_number => if_set(integer()), :route_name => if_set(binary()), :gl_long => if_set(:false or :true), :gl_branch => if_set(:false or :true)} -> open_map())

@type slashed_route_pill :: %{type: :slashed, part1: String.t(), part2: String.t(), color: Route.color()}

def shuttle_route?(%Route{id: route_id, line: %Line{id: line_id}}, %Screen{app_id: app_id}) do
  route_id |> String.downcase() |> String.contains?("shuttle") and rail_line?(line_id) and
    app_id in @shuttle_pill_enabled_screens
end
def shuttle_route?(_, _) do

def consolidate_alert_sections(sections) do
  total_rows = count_total_rows(sections)

  if total_rows > 5 do
    consolidate_sections(sections)
  else
    sections
  end
end
elixir_type: (dynamic() -> dynamic())

definition:
def consolidate_sections(sections) do
  sections
  |> Enum.map(fn {color, section} ->
    case {color, section} do
      {:green, _section} ->
        {color, section}

      {_color, %{type: :contracted, alerts: alerts}} when length(alerts) == 2 ->
        {color, consolidate_two_row_section(section, color)}

      {_color, section} ->
        {color, section}
    end
  end)
  |> Enum.into(%{})
end
elixir_type: (dynamic() -> dynamic())

definition:
def consolidate_two_row_section(section, color) do
  %{type: :contracted, alerts: alerts} = section
  route_id = color_to_route_id(color)
  route_pill = get_route_pill_for_consolidated_row(alerts, route_id)
  %{type: :contracted, alerts: [serialize_alert_summary(length(alerts), route_pill)]}
end
elixir_type: (dynamic(), atom() -> dynamic())

definition:
def count_total_rows(sections) do
  Enum.reduce(sections, 0, fn {_color, %{alerts: alerts}}, acc -> acc + length(alerts) end)
end
elixir_type: (dynamic() -> integer())

def extend_sections_if_needed(sections) do
  rows_displaying_alerts = filter_out_rows_with_normal_status(sections)

  if length(rows_displaying_alerts) <= 2 do
    extend_sections_with_alerts(sections, rows_displaying_alerts)
  else
    sections
  end
end
elixir_type: (dynamic() -> dynamic())

definition:
def extend_sections_with_alerts(sections, rows_displaying_alerts) do
  sections
  |> Enum.map(fn {color, section} ->
    case section do
      %{type: :contracted, alerts: alerts} ->
        contains_alert_status = Enum.any?(alerts, fn alert -> alert in rows_displaying_alerts end)

        case {contains_alert_status, alerts} do
          {true, [alert]} ->
            if alert_summary?(alert) do
              {color, section}
            else
              {color, %{type: :extended, alert: alert}}
            end

          _ ->
            {color, section}
        end

      %{type: :extended, alert: _alert} ->
        {color, section}
    end
  end)
  |> Enum.into(%{})
end
elixir_type: (dynamic(), empty_list() or non_empty_list(dynamic(), empty_list()) -> dynamic())

definition:
def filter_out_rows_with_normal_status(sections) do
  sections
  |> Enum.to_list()
  |> Enum.flat_map(fn {_color, %{alerts: alerts}} ->
    Enum.reject(alerts, fn alert -> Map.get(alert, :status) == @normal_service_status end)
  end)
end
elixir_type: (dynamic() -> empty_list() or non_empty_list(dynamic(), empty_list()))

def get_route_pill_for_consolidated_row(alerts, "Red") do
  all_alerts_are_mattapan =
    Enum.all?(alerts, fn alert ->
      case Map.get(alert, :route_pill) do
        %{branches: branches} when is_list(branches) -> :m in branches
        _ -> false
      end
    end)

  if all_alerts_are_mattapan do
    RoutePill.serialize_rl_mattapan_pill()
  else
    RoutePill.serialize_route_pill("Red")
  end
end

  RoutePill.serialize_route_pill(route_id)
end

def serialize_alert_rows_for_route(grouped_alerts, route_id) do
  alerts = Map.get(grouped_alerts, route_id)

  alert_rows =
    case alerts do
      alerts when is_nil(alerts) or alerts == [] ->
        [serialize_alert_with_route_pill(nil, route_id)]

      [alert] ->
        [serialize_alert_with_route_pill(alert, route_id)]

      [alert1, alert2] ->
        [serialize_alert_with_route_pill(alert1, route_id), serialize_alert(alert2, route_id)]

      alerts ->
        [serialize_alert_summary(length(alerts), RoutePill.serialize_route_pill(route_id))]
    end

  %{type: :contracted, alerts: alert_rows}
end
elixir_type: (dynamic(), binary() -> dynamic())

def serialize_gl_branch_alert_summary(branch_alerts) do
  route_ids =
    branch_alerts
    |> Enum.flat_map(&Utils.alert_routes/1)
    |> Enum.filter(&String.starts_with?(&1, "Green"))

  alert_count = length(branch_alerts)

  case branch_alerts do
    [branch_alert] ->
      serialize_gl_branch_alert(branch_alert, route_ids)

    _ ->
      Serialize.serialize_alert_summary(
        alert_count,
        RoutePill.serialize_gl_pill_with_branches(route_ids)
      )
  end
end

def serialize_gl_branch_alerts_only(branch_alerts) do
  case branch_alerts do
    [alert] ->
      route_ids = alert |> Utils.alert_routes() |> Enum.filter(&String.starts_with?(&1, "Green"))

      %{
        type: :contracted,
        alerts: [
          Map.merge(
            %{route_pill: RoutePill.serialize_gl_pill_with_branches(route_ids)},
            serialize_gl_branch_alert(alert, route_ids)
          )
        ]
      }

    [alert1, alert2] ->
      %{
        type: :contracted,
        alerts: [
          serialize_gl_branch_alert(alert1, Utils.alert_routes(alert1)),
          serialize_gl_branch_alert(alert2, Utils.alert_routes(alert2))
        ]
      }

    _ ->
      route_ids =
        branch_alerts
        |> Enum.flat_map(&Utils.alert_routes/1)
        |> Enum.filter(&String.starts_with?(&1, "Green"))

      %{
        type: :contracted,
        alerts: [
          Serialize.serialize_alert_summary(
            length(branch_alerts),
            RoutePill.serialize_gl_pill_with_branches(route_ids)
          )
        ]
      }
  end
end

def get_stop_name_with_platform(informed_entities, [platform_name], route_id) do
  stop_names = Subway.route_stop_names(route_id)
  relevant_entities = filter_entities_by_route(informed_entities, route_id)

  parent_station_id =
    Enum.find_value(relevant_entities, fn
      %InformedEntity{stop: %Stop{id: stop_id}} ->
        if Map.has_key?(stop_names, stop_id) do
          stop_id
        end

      %InformedEntity{stop: nil} ->
        nil
    end)

  case Map.get(stop_names, parent_station_id) do
    {full, _abbrev} ->
      %{full: "#{full}: #{platform_name} platform closed", abbrev: "#{full} (1 side only)"}

    nil ->
      %{full: @mbta_alerts_url, abbrev: @mbta_alerts_url}
  end
end
def get_stop_name_with_platform(_informed_entities, _platform_names, _route_id) do
  %{full: @mbta_alerts_url, abbrev: @mbta_alerts_url}
end

def get_json(path, params) do
  ctx = Screens.Telemetry.context()
  meta = Map.merge(ctx, %{path: path, query: URI.encode_query(params)})

  Screens.Telemetry.span_with_stop_meta([:screens, :v3_api, :get_json], meta, fn ->
    case Cache.get({path, params}) do
      {:fresh, {_last_modified, response}} ->
        {{:ok, response}, %{cache: "local"}}

      {:stale, {last_modified, response}} ->
        fetch_json_with_meta(path, params, last_modified, response)

      nil ->
        fetch_json_with_meta(path, params)
    end
  end)
end

def get(key, now \\ DateTime.utc_now()) do
  case cache_for(key).fetch(key) do
    {:ok, {stale_at, value}} ->
      if DateTime.before?(now, stale_at) do
        {:fresh, value}
      else
        {:stale, value}
      end

    {:error, _} ->
      nil
  end
end
elixir_type: ({binary(), open_map()} -> {:fresh, term()} or {:stale, term()} or :nil)

def put(key, value, now \\ DateTime.utc_now()) do
  cache = cache_for(key)
  stale_at = DateTime.add(now, cache.unconditional_ttl(), :millisecond)
  _ = cache.put(key, {stale_at, value})
  :ok
end

def included(
      %{"data" => [%{"id" => first_id, "type" => first_type} | _]} = data,
      included,
      default
    ) do
  case Map.get(included, {first_id, first_type}) do
    nil -> default
    _resource -> included!(data, included)
  end
end
def included(%{"data" => %{"id" => id, "type" => type}}, included, default) do
  case Map.get(included, {id, type}) do
    nil -> default
    resource -> parse_resource(resource, included)
  end
end
def included(%{"data" => []}, _included, _default) do
  []
end
def included(%{"data" => nil}, _included, _default) do
  nil
end
elixir_type: (%{binary() => if_set(term())}, %{tuple() => if_set(%{binary() => if_set(term())})}, term() -> term())

definition:
def included!(%{"data" => references}, included) when is_list(references) do
  Enum.map(references, fn %{"id" => id, "type" => type} ->
    included |> Map.fetch!({id, type}) |> parse_resource(included)
  end)
end
def included!(%{"data" => reference}, included) when is_map(reference) do
  [resource] = included!(%{"data" => [reference]}, included)
  resource
end
def included!(%{"data" => nil}, _included) do
  nil
end
elixir_type: (%{binary() => if_set(term())}, %{tuple() => if_set(%{binary() => if_set(term())})} -> %{atom() => if_set(term()), :__struct__ => atom()} or empty_list() or non_empty_list(%{atom() => if_set(term()), :__struct__ => atom()}, empty_list()) or :nil)

definition:
def parse(%{"data" => data} = response) when is_map(data) do
  [resource] = parse(%{response | "data" => [data]})
  resource
end
def parse(%{"data" => data} = response) when is_list(data) do
  included =
    response
    |> Map.get("included", [])
    |> then(&Enum.concat(data, &1))
    |> Map.new(fn %{"id" => id, "type" => type} = resource -> {{id, type}, resource} end)

  Enum.map(data, &parse_resource(&1, included))
end
elixir_type: (%{binary() => if_set(term())} -> %{atom() => if_set(term()), :__struct__ => atom()} or empty_list() or non_empty_list(%{atom() => if_set(term()), :__struct__ => atom()}, empty_list()))

def broadcast(pubsub, topic, message, dispatcher \\ __MODULE__)
    when is_atom(pubsub) and is_atom(dispatcher) do
  topics = List.wrap(topic)
  {:ok, {topology, remote}} = Registry.meta(pubsub, :pubsub)
  broadcast = {:broadcast, topics, message, dispatcher}

  with :ok <- Firenest.Topology.broadcast(topology, remote, broadcast) do
    dispatch(pubsub, :none, topics, message, dispatcher)
  end
end

    {:error, error} -> raise BroadcastError, "broadcast!/3 failed with #{inspect(error)}"
  end
end

  dispatch(pubsub, from, List.wrap(topic), message, dispatcher)
end
elixir_type: (atom(), pid(), term() or empty_list() or non_empty_list(term(), empty_list()), term(), atom() -> :ok)

def subscribe(pubsub, topic, value \\ nil) when is_atom(pubsub) do
  {:ok, _} = Registry.register(pubsub, topic, value)
  :ok
end
elixir_type: (atom(), term(), term() -> :ok)

definition:
def unsubscribe(pubsub, topic) when is_atom(pubsub) do
  Registry.unregister(pubsub, topic)
end
elixir_type: (atom(), term() -> :ok)

def get_domain_checks(domain_name) do
  query = last_checks_group_query(domain_name)

  case checks_repo().one(query) do
    nil -> []
    domain_group -> domain_group.checks
  end
end
elixir_type: (binary() -> empty_list() or non_empty_list(%{:__struct__ => :"SslMoon.Schemas.Check"}, empty_list()))

definition:
def get_latest_check(domain_name, check_name) do
  query = last_checks_group_query(domain_name)

  case checks_repo().one(query) do
    nil ->
      nil

    domain_checks ->
      domain_checks.checks |> Enum.find(fn check -> check.check_name == check_name end)
  end
end
elixir_type: (binary(), binary() -> %{atom() => if_set(term())} or %{atom() => if_set(term())} or term() or :nil)

def cast_check_result(_check, %CheckSchema{status: :not_found} = data) do
  data
end
def cast_check_result(check, data) do
  schema_module = check.validation_schema.module
  CheckSchema.result_to_schema(data, &schema_module.changeset/1)
end
elixir_type: (%{:name => dynamic(), :display_name => dynamic(), :version => integer(), :executor => dynamic(), :template => dynamic(), :migrator => :nil or dynamic(), :validation_schema => :nil or dynamic(), :__struct__ => :"SslMoon.Checks.Check"}, %{:__struct__ => :"SslMoon.Schemas.Check"} -> %{:__struct__ => :"SslMoon.Schemas.Check"})

definition:
def create_check(%Check{} = check, %CheckResult{} = check_result, check_group_id, url) do
  data = check_result.data
  status = check_result.status
  changeset = check.validation_schema.module.changeset(data)

  if changeset.valid? != true do
    {:error,
     "Validation failed for #{check.name} using schema #{check.validation_schema.module} with data: #{inspect(data)}

Changeset error: #{inspect(changeset)}
"}
  else
    Checks.create_check(%{
      domain_name: url,
      check_name: check.name,
      version: check.version,
      status: status,
      check_group_id: check_group_id,
      check_result: check.validation_schema.module.__to_map__(data)
    })
  end
end
elixir_type: (%{:name => dynamic(), :display_name => dynamic(), :version => integer(), :executor => dynamic(), :template => dynamic(), :migrator => :nil or dynamic(), :validation_schema => :nil or dynamic(), :__struct__ => :"SslMoon.Checks.Check"}, %{:data => term(), :status => :inactive or :failure or :warning or :success, :__struct__ => :"SslMoon.Checks.CheckResult"}, integer(), binary() -> {:ok, term()} or {:error, term()})
spec: @spec create_check(Check.t(), CheckResult.t(), integer(), String.t()) :: {:ok, any()} | {:error, any()}

definition:
def create_check!(%Check{} = check, %CheckResult{} = check_result, check_group_id, url) do
  case create_check(check, check_result, check_group_id, url) do
    {:ok, resp} -> resp
    {:error, msg} -> raise msg
  end
end
elixir_type: (%{:name => dynamic(), :display_name => dynamic(), :version => integer(), :executor => dynamic(), :template => dynamic(), :migrator => :nil or dynamic(), :validation_schema => :nil or dynamic(), :__struct__ => :"SslMoon.Checks.Check"}, %{:data => term(), :status => :inactive or :failure or :warning or :success, :__struct__ => :"SslMoon.Checks.CheckResult"}, integer(), binary() -> term())

definition:
def execute_check(%Check{} = check, url) do
  module = check.executor.module

  result =
    try do
      with {:ok, result} <- module.perform_check(check, url),
           {:ok, status} <- module.qualify_check(check, url, result) do
        {:ok, %CheckResult{status: status, data: result}}
      end
    rescue
      err -> module.on_error(check, url, err, __STACKTRACE__)
    end

  case result do
    {:error, err} -> module.on_error(check, url, err, nil)
    other -> other
  end
end
elixir_type: (%{:name => dynamic(), :display_name => dynamic(), :version => integer(), :executor => dynamic(), :template => dynamic(), :migrator => :nil or dynamic(), :validation_schema => :nil or dynamic(), :__struct__ => :"SslMoon.Checks.Check"}, binary() -> {:ok, %{:data => term(), :status => :inactive or :failure or :warning or :success, :__struct__ => :"SslMoon.Checks.CheckResult"}} or {:error, term()})

definition:
def render_check(%Check{} = check, url, data) do
  data = cast_check_result(check, data)
  render_template(%{check: check, domain_name: url, check_data: data})
end
elixir_type: (%{:name => dynamic(), :display_name => dynamic(), :version => integer(), :executor => dynamic(), :template => dynamic(), :migrator => :nil or dynamic(), :validation_schema => :nil or dynamic(), :__struct__ => :"SslMoon.Checks.Check"}, binary(), %{:__struct__ => :"SslMoon.Schemas.Check"} -> term())
spec: @spec render_check(check :: Check.t(), url :: String.t(), data :: CheckSchema.t()) :: any()

def generate_opts(:executor, opts) do
  active = Keyword.get(opts, :active, true)
  %{active: active}
end
def generate_opts(:template, opts) do
  show = Keyword.get(opts, :show, true)
  %{show: show}
end
def generate_opts(:migrator, _opts) do
  %{}
end
def generate_opts(:validation_schema, _opts) do
  %{}
end
elixir_type: (:executor, empty_list() or non_empty_list({atom(), term()}, empty_list()) -> %{:active => :true or :false}) and (:template, empty_list() or non_empty_list({atom(), term()}, empty_list()) -> %{:show => :true or :false}) and (:migrator, empty_list() or non_empty_list({atom(), term()}, empty_list()) -> open_map()) and (:validation_schema, empty_list() or non_empty_list({atom(), term()}, empty_list()) -> open_map())
